title: Library of Congress Conservation Movement Primary Sources
description: A LOC source card for primary sources about conservation and environmental history.
license: Library of Congress / item-level rights vary

pages.text: The Library of Congress conservation movement source set supports inquiry into national parks, resource use, public lands, reform, and changing ideas about nature.
Use this source for comparing historical arguments about preservation, development, science, recreation, and public responsibility.
Library of Congress source sets include public-domain and rights-unknown primary sources. Use the item pages to confirm rights before mirroring individual documents.
